title: Like That
why_this_song: Like That by Future (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nigga" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nigga" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "young" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "young" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Gotta fire my joint up on this bitch
Nigga, bum, what? I'm really like that

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Young Metro, Metro, young Metro, three times
Ah, my temperament bipolar, I choose violence

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Future one question about "Like That", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Future sobre "Like That", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Like That" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Like That" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Like That" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Like That" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Like That" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Like That" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
